title: An Act Regarding Liquor Licensing in Outdoor Stadiums and Exclusivity in Licensee Agreements
last_house_action: 3/28/2025 - Received by the Clerk of the House on March 28, 2025. The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on VETERANS AND LEGAL AFFAIRS pursuant to Joint Rule 308.2 and ordered printed pursuant to Joint Rule 401.
